name: publication-pdf-translator
description: Operate a pinned, resumable, evidence-governed publication PDF translation runtime through MCP.

interface.longDescription: Bootstrap, initialize, diagnose, run, resume, inspect and collect verified publication translations without moving translation or layout state into chat.
defaultPrompt: Translate this complete publication PDF and return the verified restored-layout PDF plus its report.
Resume this publication translation project and continue until its verified PDF is released.
